name: Asparagus Strata
recipeIngredient: 1 can Asparagus, pieces or spears         4 American cheese slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 4 slices of bread (with crusts removed) in a greased 8×8×2 inch pan.
2. Put a slice of cheese on each piece of bread, then place asparagus evenly on top of the cheese.
3. Cover each with another slice of bread.
4. In a separate bowl, mix egg, milk, salt, pepper, and mustard.
5. Pour the mixture over the bread layers.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Sprinkle additional grated cheese on top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes or until the custard is set (a knife inserted comes out clean).
